universal-robots-display-remote-display-.title: Display Remote Application
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.supportiveText: Configure the external website or IP address shown on the operator screen.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.url-invalid: Enter an IP address (e.g. 192.168.0.100:8080) or a URL starting with http:// or https://

universal-robots-display-remote-display-.title: Display Remote Sidebar
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.configure-url: Set a remote URL or IP address in the Display Remote Application settings.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.load-error: Could not load Display Remote Application settings.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.connecting-message: Attempting to reach the configured remote site. This may take a few seconds.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.timeout-error: The configured remote site did not respond in time. Check that the address is correct and the robot can reach it.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.unreachable-error: The configured remote site cannot be reached. Check that the site is online and the address is correct.

universal-robots-display-remote-display-.title: Display Remote Operator
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.configure-url: Set a remote URL or IP address in the Display Remote Application settings, then reopen the operator screen.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.invalid-url: The configured address is invalid. Use an IP address (e.g. 192.168.0.100) or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.load-error: Could not load Display Remote Application settings.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.connecting-message: Attempting to reach the configured remote site. This may take a few seconds.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.timeout-error: The configured remote site did not respond in time. Check that the address is correct and the robot can reach it.
universal-robots-display-remote-display-.unreachable-error: The configured remote site cannot be reached. Check that the site is online and the address is correct.
